Oklahoma Occupational Therapist License Reciprocity & How to Apply

Already licensed elsewhere? Start with compact status, endorsement requirements, fees, and your likely transfer timeline.

Last verified 2026-02-25
Compact Enacted - Not Yet Active

Reciprocity in Oklahoma for Occupational Therapists

Oklahoma has enacted the OT Compact, but compact privileges are not yet issuing. Until implementation goes live, apply by endorsement through the state board.

Once active, compact participation should reduce or eliminate the need for a separate transfer application.

Endorsement fee
$0
Processing time
4 to 6 Weeks
Fingerprinting
Required
Temporary license
Available
See endorsement steps Official board portal

Endorsement Application Steps

  1. Complete Education & Fieldwork

    Earn a master's or doctoral degree in occupational therapy from an ACOTE-accredited program and complete specific fieldwork requirements.

  2. Pass the NBCOT Examination

    Pass the National Board for Certification in Occupational Therapy (NBCOT) exam for OTRs.

  3. Submit Application and Fees

    Complete the state application, undergo a background check if required, and submit the necessary licensing fees.

Quick Facts

Total fee
Processing time
4 to 6 Weeks
Renewal fee
Renewal cycle
Every 2 years

Required Documents

  • Official Transcripts: Sent directly from your educational institution.
  • NBCOT Score Report: Official verification of passing the NBCOT exam.

Renewal

Renewal fee is . Renewal cycle: Every 2 years.

Oklahoma Occupational Therapist Reciprocity FAQ

How much does a Oklahoma OT license cost?

The initial application and licensing fee varies, often around to . Check the specific fee breakdown.

Is NBCOT certification required?

Yes, passing the NBCOT exam is a standard requirement for initial licensure across all states.

Does Oklahoma have reciprocity for occupational therapists?

Oklahoma has enacted the OT Compact, but compact privileges are not yet issuing. For now, occupational therapists still apply by endorsement through the state board.

How long does it take to transfer my occupational therapist license to Oklahoma?

Most endorsement applications take 4 to 6 Weeks. If you qualify for an active compact privilege, there may be no separate wait to start practicing.

Can I start working in Oklahoma while my endorsement application is processing?

A temporary or provisional credential is available while the full endorsement application is pending.
